first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions correctly identify the same critical skill gap between the candidate's experience (full-stack web development) and the role's requirements (low-level C++ and cloud compute). The minor differences in wording fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment based on the altered employer names.
